creator: dmaddox@scsn.net
text:
This is a submission of a new port - X-Files-1.43.  X-Files is
	a very nice Tk-based filemanager for X that is based originally
	on the Amiga DirWorks filemanager.

Fix: 

Commit the port :-)

	Distfile and port have been uploaded to:

		ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/X-Files-1.43.tar.gz
	and
		ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/X-Files-port.tar.gz

	respectively.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Not Applicable.
